title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. The separate fights across Alubarna intensify while the bomb plot and the civil war continue moving forward. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: there are times... when you have to fight...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: is when your friend's dreams are laughed at!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: How the hell did he survive a 4 ton bat hit to the head!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's no way he could've stood up after that hit, much less be even alive!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So that's one thing I won't let you laugh at!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Time to show you my Trans- Forma- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Even if you act tough, there's nothing you can do with that weak body of yours!

summary: This part develops a straw hat refuses to fall and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
